title: rubus × fultus
intro: Rubus × fultus, a hybrid of the black raspberry and the blackberry, is a type of bramble plant that is native to North America. It has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × fultus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various ways, including making teas, jams, and tinctures, as well as being consumed fresh or frozen.
